positive: An abstract, stylized celestial guardian figure, depicting a powerful, graceful being surrounded by swirling nebulae, constellation patterns, and bioluminescent cosmic flora. The figure has a clean, symmetrical silhouette, rendered in high contrast shades of sapphire blue, deep indigo, and vibrant starlight gold. Composition is centered and highly graphic, suitable for a repeating pattern or large chest print. The style is neo-art deco meets ethereal scientific illustration, giving it sharp lines and mythic grandeur. Use a strong backlighting effect to create clear separation from the background. --ar 1:1
